sectionTitle: The services offered by the office includes:

cards.title: City Transactions:
cards.mainDescription: Facilitates processing of documents (vouchers, payrolls, and contracts)
items: Employee’s Remittances to GSIS and HDMF Loans & Premiums / Philhealth Premiums / BIR Withholding Tax / Cooperative and Bank Loans
Accountant’s Advice of Local Check Disbursement

cards.title: Barangay Transactions:
cards.mainDescription: Facilitates recording of barangay transactions (182 barangays)
items: Accountant’s Certification for the cash and cash-related accounts as per book balances
